title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY PUNTA BURI, MUNICIPALITY OF AJUY, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO BE KNOWN AS THE PUNTA BURI NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 5902

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8375, August 11, 1997 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY PUNTA BURI, MUNICIPALITY OF AJUY, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO BE KNOWN AS THE PUNTA BURI NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established a national high school in Barangay Punta Buri, Municipality of Ajuy, Province of Iloilo, to be known as the Punta Buri National High School.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Education, Culture and Sports shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this Act.

SEC. 3. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,
